channel.title: Projects on Yiming Xu
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Yiming Xu

item.title: Hierarchical Planner
item.description: A navigation-first planner that walks a document’s hierarchy instead of flat top-k retrieval, using layered embeddings as routing hints.

item.title: E-commerce AI Agent
item.description: Flagship conversational shopping agent. Led development end-to-end; the project went on to raise close to USD 7M in funding.

item.title: Multimodal RAG
item.description: Master’s thesis on retrieval-augmented generation across text and image, supervised by Benno Kruit and Jan-Christoph Kalo.
